title: deschampsia boyacensis
intro: Deschampsia boyacensis, also known as the Colombian hair grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Deschampsia boyacensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or infusions of the leaves, which can be consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
